title: Snowy Fox as Annoying Dog from undertale/deltarune
description: pretty self-explanatory it changes the snowy fox into the toby dog
body:
the title is pretty self explainatory

turns the snow fox into the toby dog from undertale and deltarune im ngl it looks pretty bad but this is my first resource pack and im just testing stuff out

i also want to make it where you have to name the fox toby so that its like a pun and stuff but idk how to do that and i dont want to learn
